log: REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:3+3=6 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:7+-2=5 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:19+-2=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
--- Frost Giant --- HP: 138/138 | AC: 15 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Dhampir — Unarmored Caster.
--- Dhampir — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: Concentrating on Hypnotic Pattern. Vicious Mockery on Ogre (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Ogre.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:18+-2=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
